title: Trump says FBI should not look into Lindsey Graham
shortDescription: President Donald Trump told the press he doesn't think the FBI should investigate Lindsey Graham's death.

title: Bill to make daylight saving time permanent advances in House
shortDescription: The House Rules Committee advanced the Sunshine Protection Act of 2025. See the next steps for the permanent daylight saving time bill to become law.

title: E. Jean Carroll gets $5.6M from Trump for sex abuse, defamation
shortDescription: E. Jean Carroll received more than $5.6 million from Donald Trump, three years after a jury held Trump liable for sexually abusing and defaming her.

title: Trump news, schedule and updates for today July 14
shortDescription: Trump said it was a 'fabulous tribute' to Lindsey Graham to have his sister fill his seat. Trump announced a speech. See more Trump news for July 14.

title: Ossoff says Trump's 'obsession' with GA elections is about Black voters
shortDescription: President Trump is expected to give remarks Thursday about alleged fraud in the 2020 election, while GA Senator Jon Ossoff has called out 'obsession.'

title: Are progressive Democrats dooming the party for the midterms? | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Democratic leaders are concerned that the momentum from Democratic socialists will be used by the GOP to paint the entire party as liberal activists.

title: Trump backs off plan to charge tolls at Strait of Hormuz: Live updates
shortDescription: President Trump walked back his proposal to take over the Strait of Hormuz and charge a 20% fee on passing ships, a day after making the announcement.

title: New York man charged with threatening Donald Trump Jr.
shortDescription: A Rochester man faces federal charges after allegedly threatening to kill Donald Trump Jr. during a podcast livestream.

title: Are progressive Democrats dooming the party for the midterms?
shortDescription: Democratic leaders are concerned that the momentum from Democratic socialists will be used by the GOP to paint the entire party as liberal activists.

title: Graham's death tests Trump's slim, feuding GOP majority in Congress
shortDescription: Congress just lost arguably its most effective liaison with President Trump.

title: In Iowa, Buttigieg leaves door open to potential 2028 White House bid
shortDescription: The winner of the 2020 Iowa Democratic caucuses offered a one-word response when asked if he would rule out a 2028 White House run: "Nope."

title: From disabilities services to US Senate: Who is Lindsey Graham's sister?
shortDescription: Lindsey Graham's sister helped on his campaigns during her career in disabilities services. Now she's South Carolina's next U.S. senator.

title: Trump pushes for Strait of Hormuz cargo fee
shortDescription: President Trump proposes charging cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz as Iran and the U.S. trade strikes.

title: Trump trophy statue appears on National Mall
shortDescription: A satirical Trump participation trophy statue debuts on the National Mall.

title: Sister of Lindsey Graham to serve Senate term remainder
shortDescription: Darline Graham Nordone will serve the remainder of her brother Lindsey Graham’s Senate term after his sudden death, pledging to continue his work.

title: Trump hosts IndyCar drivers at White House promoting Freedom 250 race
shortDescription: Trump welcomed IndyCar to the White House ahead of the Freedom 250 Grand Prix next month on the National Mall for America’s 250th anniversary.

title: Trump hosts IndyCar drivers at White House ahead of DC Grand Prix
shortDescription: President Trump hosted three IndyCar drivers at the White House on Monday to promote the Freedom 250 Grand Prix, which will take place Aug. 22 and 23.

title: Lindsey Graham death shakes Senate
shortDescription: The sudden death of GOP Sen. Lindsey Graham has rattled Capitol Hill — and left Congress without one of its most effective Trump liaisons.

title: Trump to address nation Thursday
shortDescription: President Trump said he will address the nation on July 16 as the war with Iran flares again and a high-stakes election season approaches.

title: Trump teases Freedom 250 Grand Prix at White House
shortDescription: President Donald Trump hosted three IndyCar drivers at the White House as he touted the Freedom 250 Grand Prix. The event included a pit stop demo.

title: Participation trophy statue appears in DC. Group wants your trophies for Trump
shortDescription: The Secret Handshake is back with another statue poking fun at Trump: a participation trophy. The group wants the public to donate their old trophies.
